subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous Fort was built during the reign of Raja Jai Singh?
question_hi: राजा जीएसिंग के राजधानी के लिए किस मंगलमान मनिष्टित कीजित कीजित किया गया था?
explanation_en: Nahargarh Fort was built during the reign of Maharaja Sawai Jai Singh II. It is known for its unique architectural design and stunning views of the city.

explanation_en: Nahargarh Fort, also known as Amer Fort, was built during the reign of Raja Man Singh II. It is a popular historical monument located in Jaipur.

explanation_en: The correct answer is A. Nahargarh Fort was built during the reign of Raja Man Singh II.
